summary: Accepted for synthesis-boundary review. The target repair candidate is limited to recording the repair candidate itself and updating the original D+Q bone RCT extraction-refresh candidate lifecycle and summary to reflect already linked needs-revision findings; it does not promote the candidate or add new synthesis claims.

findings.claim_or_issue: The target repair candidate proposes only repair bookkeeping and a lifecycle/summary update for senolytics-bone-rct-extraction-refresh-2026-06-21, with no mutation of source, study, finding, outcome, result, or synthesis records.
findings.why_it_matters: A synthesis-boundary review should prevent an administrative repair from changing the evidentiary interpretation or promoting the extraction-refresh candidate while extraction-fidelity and safety-limitations issues remain open.
findings.recommended_action: Accept this review lane and keep any extraction, safety, or synthesis-content changes in separate bounded repair candidates before promotion is considered.
